title: Starry's CatPack
description: A Fabric Create-Focused pack built around cooperative settlement creation!
body:
# What's Inside?

Looking for a vast adventure to set out upon? Ruins, depths, or even the sky itself to explore? Wanna do it in style with your very own rail network? Perhaps even install a shiny new facotry in those very same ruins? Look no further! Here you'll find all that and more! Designed around small community groups and parties, you'll have plenty of resources at your disposal to build the factories of your dreams!

With Create and its host of addons, your logistics networks can be bigger and better than ever as they sprawl out across the overhauled terrain generation, or even send manufacturing to new heights with the Aether mod! Explore the depths to find vast resources with Alex's Caves, and establish the perfect vista to gaze upon your empire thanks to Distant Horizons!
